prompt: You inherit a 5-million-line legacy C++ codebase with no documentation. Describe your first month of work to understand, stabilize, and improve it.
Design a distributed URL shortening service capable of handling one billion requests per day. Justify every architectural decision.
You are given root access to a Linux server that suddenly became unresponsive. Describe your debugging process from start to finish.
Review the architecture of a large e-commerce platform and identify its biggest scalability bottlenecks.
Design a recommendation system for an online video platform that serves hundreds of millions of users.
You are responsible for migrating a company's infrastructure from on-premise servers to the cloud. Create a detailed migration plan.
Implement a compiler for a small programming language supporting variables, loops, functions, and recursion. Explain each compilation stage.
Design an operating system scheduler optimized for interactive desktop workloads.
Explain how you would build a distributed file system similar to Google File System from scratch.
Design a globally distributed chat application supporting real-time messaging, offline synchronization, and end-to-end encryption.
You are an autonomous AI agent responsible for booking an international business trip. Describe every action you would perform using available tools.
Plan how an AI assistant should automatically triage 10,000 unread emails while minimizing important mistakes.
Design an AI workflow that receives customer bug reports, reproduces the issue, creates GitHub tickets, and notifies developers.
Describe how an autonomous warehouse robot should react when multiple delivery tasks conflict with each other.
You are building an AI software engineer. Explain how it should plan, execute, verify, and recover from failures while modifying code.
Given access to a browser, terminal, Python interpreter, and database, explain how you would investigate declining company revenue.
Create a strategy for an AI research assistant that automatically reads, summarizes, and categorizes newly published machine learning papers.
Design an autonomous disaster-response drone coordination system capable of adapting to changing conditions.
You are conducting a security audit of a banking application. Identify the most critical vulnerabilities and propose mitigations.
Perform a threat model for a password manager application.
Explain how you would detect and investigate an advanced persistent threat inside a corporate network.
Review an authentication architecture supporting billions of users and identify possible weaknesses.
Design a secure software update mechanism resistant to supply-chain attacks.
Describe how you would build a zero-trust enterprise network from the ground up.
Design a training pipeline for a 70-billion-parameter language model from raw data collection through deployment.
Explain how you would optimize inference latency for a Mixture-of-Experts language model running on limited GPU memory.
Design a distributed training strategy for a trillion-parameter transformer model.
Compare tensor parallelism, pipeline parallelism, sequence parallelism, and expert parallelism in large-scale AI training.
Explain how you would debug an unstable deep learning training run that occasionally diverges after several thousand optimization steps.
Design a benchmark suite for evaluating reasoning capabilities of modern language models.
Suppose a nationwide power outage lasts for thirty days. Develop a national recovery strategy prioritizing critical infrastructure.
You are appointed director of a space agency with a fixed budget. Prioritize missions for the next twenty years and justify every choice.
Develop a long-term strategy for ensuring freshwater availability in a rapidly growing megacity.
Design the governance structure for the first permanent human settlement on Mars.
Create a contingency plan for recovering the global financial system after a catastrophic cyberattack.
Review a scientific paper claiming room-temperature superconductivity. Describe how you would verify the claims before accepting the results.
Design an experimental protocol to evaluate whether a newly developed drug is both safe and effective.
Compare competing explanations for the Fermi Paradox and argue which is currently most plausible.
Develop a framework for evaluating whether an AI-generated scientific discovery should be trusted.
You are asked to lead negotiations between three companies competing to acquire the same startup. Develop your negotiation strategy.
Act as chief strategy officer for a company that must survive disruptive AI automation over the next decade.
Design a hiring process that minimizes interviewer bias while maximizing candidate quality.
Develop a pricing strategy for a new SaaS product entering a highly competitive market.
Design a realistic simulation environment for training autonomous delivery robots before deployment in real cities.
Suppose humanity receives an encrypted message from another civilization. Describe the global scientific response over the next five years.
Imagine you are the lead engineer responsible for restarting civilization after a global technological collapse. Prioritize what should be rebuilt first.
Design the constitution of the world's first AI-governed digital nation.
You are responsible for coordinating the evacuation of one million people before an approaching supervolcano eruption. Produce a detailed operational plan.
Develop a complete strategy for detecting misinformation campaigns across multiple social media platforms while minimizing censorship of legitimate speech.
Explain how you would build a fully autonomous research laboratory capable of generating, testing, and publishing scientific discoveries with minimal human intervention.
